zh.lifeSummary: Aleidis van Heusden是Alveradis van Cuijk的女兒，於1190年11月17日出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德斯登。她於1215年與Dirk I van Brederode在荷蘭努-布拉班特阿斯特斯登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1263年1月9日在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德倫可盧姆享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Aleidis van Heusden是Alveradis van Cuijk的女儿，于1190年11月17日出生在荷兰蓋爾德藍德斯登。她于1215年与Dirk I van Brederode在荷兰努-布拉班特阿斯特斯登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1263年1月9日在荷兰蓋爾德藍德倫可盧姆享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Heusden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ousden (Suffolk) with prosthetic initial H-. The placename derives from Old English ūf ‘owl’ (genitive ūfes) + denu ‘valley’.

en.lifeSummary: Aleidis van Heusden was born on 17 November 1190, in Heusden, Gelderland, Netherlands as the daughter of Alveradis van Cuijk. She married Dirk I van Brederode in 1215, in Heusden, Asten, North Brabant, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 9 January 1263, in Heukelum, Vuren, Gelderland, Netherlands, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Aleidis van Heusden est née le 17 novembre 1190, à Heusden, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, fille de Alveradis van Cuijk. Elle a épousé Dirk I van Brederode en 1215, à Heusden, Asten, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 janvier 1263, à Heukelum, Vuren, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Aleidis van Heusden wurde am 17. November 1190 in Heusden, Geldern, Niederlande, als Tochter von Alveradis van Cuijk geboren. Sie hat 1215 in Heusden, Asten, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande Dirk I van Brederode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Januar 1263 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Heukelum, Vuren, Geldern, Niederlande.

it.Heusden, North Brabant, Netherlands: Heusden, Asten, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi
it.lifeSummary: Aleidis van Heusden è nata il il 17 novembre 1190 nel Heusden, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi come figlia di Alveradis van Cuijk. Lei sposato Dirk I van Brederode nel 1215, nel Heusden, Asten, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 9 gennaio 1263, nel Heukelum, Vuren, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aleidis van Heusdenは1190年11月17日にオランダジェルダーランドヘウスデンでAlveradis van Cuijkの娘として生まれた。1215年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントアステンヘウスデンでDirk I van Brederodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1263年1月9日にオランダジェルダーランドvウレンヘウケルムで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aleidis van Heusden(은)는 1190년 11월 17일 네덜란드 글델랜드 헤우즈든에서 Alveradis van Cuijk의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1215년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 애스텐 헤우즈든에서 Dirk I van Brederode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1263년 1월 9일 네덜란드 글델랜드 브런 헤우켈럼에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Aleidis van Heusden nasceu em 17 de novembro de 1190, em Heusden, Gheldria, Países Baixos filha de Alveradis van Cuijk. Ela casou-se com Dirk I van Brederode em 1215, em Heusden, Asten, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1263, em Heukelum, Vuren, Gheldria, Países Baixos, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Aleidis van Heusden родилась 17 ноября 1190 г. в местности хеусден, джелдирланд, Нидерланды. Её мать звали Alveradis van Cuijk. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dirk I van Brederode в 1215 г. в местности хеусден, астен, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 9 января 1263 г. в местности хеукелум, вурен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Aleidis van Heusden nació el 17 de noviembre de 1190, en Heusden, Gelderland, Países Bajos como hija de Alveradis van Cuijk. Se casó con Dirk I van Brederode en 1215, en Heusden, Asten, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de enero de 1263, en Heukelum, Vuren, Gelderland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 72 años.
